implementation_scope: canonical source-media registration, VideoEditProgram and read-only timeline projection
exact word-boundary EDL with source-to-output mapping and protected tails
actual local FFmpeg source-led talking-head render and artifact receipts
Remotion and HyperFrames deterministic binding manifests without runtime execution claims
renderer-neutral Composition IR with functional semantic BBOX geometry and Negative Space
PRETEXT-compatible deterministic reference text measurement and no-rewrite overflow gate
optional skia-python rendering with explicitly labeled deterministic reference raster fallback
actual source-grounded SuperVisual PNG and Carousel PNG/PDF artifacts
actual reusable non-Format-02 animation-scene MP4 realization
rendered cut evidence, static reparse, hard-gate evaluation and evaluator separation
responsible-layer diagnosis and bounded descendant-only repair plans
closed schemas, CLI, tests, exact per-Spec traceability and gap ledger
non_goals: full completion of the 13 governing Specs
certified VLM or human visual evaluation
real Skia worker proof when skia-python is unavailable
complete external PRETEXT binary or production font-shaping proof
VAE asset production, VAE Stage 5, GNM, ComfyUI, SAM3 or Lucida
